name: Fall Harvest Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Spice or carrot cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans.
2. Combine cake mix, water, eggs, oil, and apple butter in a medium bowl. Beat on low speed of an electric mixer until blended; beat at medium speed for 2 minutes. Pour batter into prepared pans.
3. Bake 35 to 40 minutes until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes. Remove to racks and cool completely.
4. Prepare Maple Buttercream frosting by beating margarine and syrup in a small bowl until blended. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until smooth.
5. Place one cake layer on serving plate; frost top with Maple buttercream. Top with second layer; frost top and sides of the cake with frosting. Press walnuts into side of the cake.
6. Pipe chocolate onto the cake to form a tree trunk. Combine almonds, apricots, cranberries, and raisins. Sprinkle on top of the cake to form leaves.
If dried cranberries are unavailable, use additional chopped dried apricots and raisins.
